description: Public-safe architecture understanding eval cases. These validate grounded review behavior, not model parity.

cases.prompt: Review combat input and combo ownership boundaries.
requiredMentions: component-owned combat state only if member/function evidence exists
Blueprint-facing names should not be renamed without migration
forbiddenClaims: move all input binding into component without checking Enhanced Input ownership
claim unused asset without reference scan

cases.prompt: Review player input ownership across controller, pawn, component, and Enhanced Input bindings.
requiredMentions: component ownership only with call/member evidence
forbiddenClaims: component owns all input without checking binding site
remove Enhanced Input without Build.cs and binding evidence

cases.prompt: Review whether gameplay state belongs in an ActorComponent or subsystem.
forbiddenClaims: introduce a new subsystem when an existing subsystem already owns the role
move actor instance state into global subsystem without lifecycle evidence

cases.prompt: Evaluate reflected property/function rename risk for Blueprint-facing classes.
forbiddenClaims: rename reflected property safely without migration
Blueprint references do not need validation

cases.prompt: Review DataAsset, montage, sequence, texture, and soft object reference risk before cleanup.
requiredMentions: do not claim unused without reference scan
forbiddenClaims: asset is unused from C++ grep alone
delete DataAsset reference without content validation

cases.prompt: Review editor-only API usage in runtime modules.
forbiddenClaims: add UnrealEd to runtime module without boundary review
editor-only include is safe in runtime public header

cases.prompt: Draft a safe refactor plan from architecture hints without executing edits.
requiredMentions: generated architecture hints are not truth
